span.p:
Execution validation
Qiskit materialization, failure classes, OpenQASM export

div.style: color: rgb(16, 42, 16) !important; display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;

span.p:
Benchmark-readiness scoring
n/7 and n/8 gate profiles

div.style: color: rgb(34, 17, 47) !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
Metadata-design evaluation
27 added fields, full coverage, cross-tabs

div.style: color: rgb(48, 32, 0) !important; display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;

span.p:
Acceptance-gate pilot
256-row stratified review
209 accept / 47 rewrite

div.style: color: rgb(48, 32, 0) !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
K-R remediation
47 core rewrites + 235 lineage neighbors
282 / 282 closed

div.style: color: rgb(16, 42, 16) !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
Semantic consistency
Sentence-transformer similarity, BERTScore F1, BLEU, ROUGE-L, edit distance

div.style: color: rgb(16, 42, 16) !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
Paraphrase diversity
10,000 groups sampled, near-duplicate audit

span.p:
